theme_identity: Digital Forensic / Brutalist Archive. A high-end mix of government black-box surveillance, Rhodia bureaucratic stationery, and glitchy HUD interfaces.

textures.grain: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

components.name: Forensic HUD Frame
components.css: border: 1px solid var(--border); position: relative; padding: 2ch; &::before { content: '[SCAN_ACTIVE]'; position: absolute; top: -1ch; left: 2ch; background: var(--background); font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--primary); }

components.name: Brutalist Data Table
components.description: High-density Rhodia-style lists with 1px borders and no padding-left.

components.name: Pixel Dust Gradient
components.css: mask-image: radial-gradient(black, transparent); background-image: var(--dot_matrix); background-size: 4px 4px;
